slots: small city / China, coastal town / Japan
example: My hometown is a small city in China.

slots: flat / the city center, house / the university
example: I live in a flat near the city center.

slots: Computer Science / university, Business / college
example: I'm studying Computer Science at university.

slots: teacher / a school, engineer / a company
example: I work as a teacher for a school.

pattern: In my free time, I like to ___.
slots: read, take photos, play sports
example: In my free time, I like to take photos.

pattern: I got into ___ when I was ___.
slots: photography / 15, painting / in high school
example: I got into photography when I was 15.

slots: the bus / work, the subway / school
example: I usually take the bus to work.

slots: walking / it's healthy, driving / it's fast
example: I prefer walking because it's healthy.

pattern: The place I'd like to recommend is ___.
slots: a small town in Yunnan, a coastal city in Spain
example: The place I'd like to recommend is a small town in Yunnan.

slots: the view is amazing, it's not too touristy
example: I would recommend it because the view is amazing.

slots: economic benefits / harms the environment
example: While tourism brings economic benefits, it also harms the environment.

pattern: One way to solve this is ___.
slots: to limit visitor numbers, to promote eco-tourism
example: One way to solve this is to limit visitor numbers.

pattern: The person I'd like to describe is ___.
slots: my teacher, an old friend, a stranger I met
example: The person I'd like to describe is my teacher.

slots: his kindness, her creativity, their generosity
example: What impressed me most was his kindness.

slots: communicate, interact, maintain relationships
example: Technology has changed how we communicate.

pattern: On the one hand ___. On the other hand ___.
slots: it connects us / it isolates us
example: On the one hand it connects us. On the other hand it isolates us.

pattern: One of the most memorable experiences was ___.
slots: volunteering abroad, studying overseas
example: One of the most memorable experiences was volunteering abroad.

slots: perseverance pays off, failure is part of growth
example: This experience taught me that failure is part of growth.

pattern: The role of education is to ___.
slots: prepare students for life, develop critical thinking
example: The role of education is to develop critical thinking.

slots: Interactive learning / rote memorization / it engages students
example: Interactive learning is more effective than rote memorization.

pattern: The change I'd like to see is ___.
slots: greater environmental awareness, more equality
example: The change I'd like to see is greater environmental awareness.

pattern: If I could change one thing, ___.
slots: I would reduce pollution, I would promote education
example: If I could change one thing, I would promote education.

slots: cultural exchange, economic growth, homogenization
example: Globalization has led to greater cultural exchange.

pattern: It's important to strike a balance between ___.
slots: development / tradition, globalization / cultural preservation
example: It's important to strike a balance between development and tradition.
